title: The Final Obstacles Remain
description: Pages 14–16 focus on the final obstacles remain, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the Smile Factory and the remaining officers become the last obstacles before Luffy can fully confront Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I hope you don't think you have beat me just because you've cut my "stone"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's no way you'll be able to cut me now that I'm shielding myself with Haki!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Over the 9 mountains, across the eight seas...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: After I've founded you into the ground, you'll be the one that's lost!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: is stronger than mine, that is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...I here is nothing I cannot cut...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: BfGeeee?! The whole thing's still gonna end up falling right on us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: How dare he use my "King Punch"...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: For rubble clean-up duty!! I ain't forgettin' this any time soon!!!

summary: The Final Obstacles Remain advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
